creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

Please let portmgr decide about this. 

- Not everybody can afford to rebuild all ports in one go. There 
is with portupgrade or portmaster no way to track which ones are 
done if the version numbering isn't changed. 

- Changes in the ABI can cause breakage in operations. Without a 
version numbering change we will not be able to determine if all 
required ports are at the current level and if the issue is before 
or after the change to the new version of devel/gettext.
